title: celmisia verbascifolia subsp. membranacea
intro: Celmisia verbascifolia subsp. membranacea is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Celmisia verbascifolia subsp. membranacea include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and to support the immune system.
